subject: U.S. Invests $1.5 Mil to Help Salvadoran Police Deal with COVID-19 Stress
body:
While local law enforcement agencies around the United States weather extensive budget cuts, the federal government is dedicating $1.5 million to assist police in El Salvador with challenges and stress created by COVID-19.

# [U.S. Invests $1.5 Mil to Help Salvadoran Police Deal with COVID-19 Stress](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57462&L=26494&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdS1zLWdpdmVzLXNhbHZhZG9yYW4tcG9saWNlLTEtNS1taWxsaW9uLXRvLWRlYWwtd2l0aC1jb3ZpZC0xOS1zdHJlc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
While local law enforcement agencies around the United States weather extensive budget cuts, the federal government is dedicating $1.5 million to assist police in El Salvador with challenges and stress created by COVID-19. The goal is to help the Central American nation’s 26,966-member National Civil Police (PNC) asses its role and capacities during a crisis and efficiently provide training to manage a public health emergency like the pandemic. “The training will particularly focus on public health orders, personal and workplace safety measures, education in regards to transmission and proper treatment, and management of operational continuity,” according to a grant announcement made public this month.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57462&L=26494&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdS1zLWdpdmVzLXNhbHZhZG9yYW4tcG9saWNlLTEtNS1taWxsaW9uLXRvLWRlYWwtd2l0aC1jb3ZpZC0xOS1zdHJlc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
|

### [Judicial Watch: Records Detail U.S. Embassy Concerns about China’s ‘Anal Swab’ COVID Testing of U.S. Diplomatic Personnel ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57462&L=26512&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYW5hbC1zd2FiLXVzLWRpcGxvbWF0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch “It took six months and a federal lawsuit to confirm that our embassy in Beijing was concerned about the Chinese government’s invasive anal swab and other COVID testing of our diplomatic personnel – and that as many as two people were asked to submit to a test,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Our diplomatic personnel were harassed in a reprehensible way by the Chinese government, and the Biden administration seems to have done little in response – except to cover it up.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57462&L=26512&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYW5hbC1zd2FiLXVzLWRpcGxvbWF0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---
### [Judicial Watch Sues Maryland for Gerrymandered Congressional Districts – Voters Challenge Unconstitutional Plan ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57462&L=26523&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1tZC1nZXJyeW1hbmRlcmluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch The lawsuit relates that a bipartisan commission recommended a map to Maryland Governor Larry Hogan on November 5 that he approved, but the legislature passed a different proposal in a straight party-line vote. On December 9, 2021, Hogan vetoed this proposal, and, the same day, the state legislature overrode his veto on another party-line vote. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57462&L=26523&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1tZC1nZXJyeW1hbmRlcmluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---
### [Judicial Watch Wins Appeal on Release of Sally Yates’ Records on Refusal to Enforce President Trump’s Travel Ban ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57462&L=26525&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctdmljdG9yeS15YXRlcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Judicial Watch The appellate court reversed a lower court ruling that the Justice Department could withhold certain records under the Freedom of Information Act’s Exemption 5 “deliberative process privilege,” which can be used to keep secret “pre-decisional” agency records. The appeals court ordered the lower court to directly review the records at issue in camera to determine if they qualify for withholding as “deliberative.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57462&L=26525&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctdmljdG9yeS15YXRlcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

clean_body: While local law enforcement agencies around the United States weather extensive budget cuts, the federal government is dedicating $1.5 million to assist police in El Salvador with challenges and stress created by COVID-19. | | | Because no one is above the law! | December 24, 2021 ---|---|--- | | = = While local law enforcement agencies around the United States weather extensive budget cuts, the federal government is dedicating $1.5 million to assist police in El Salvador with challenges and stress created by COVID-19. The goal is to help the Central American nation’s 26,966-member National Civil Police (PNC) asses its role and capacities during a crisis and efficiently provide training to manage a public health emergency like the pandemic. “The training will particularly focus on public health orders, personal and workplace safety measures, education in regards to transmission and proper treatment, and management of operational continuity,” according to a grant announcement made public this month. = | | | == Judicial Watch “It took six months and a federal lawsuit to confirm that our embassy in Beijing was concerned about the Chinese government’s invasive anal swab and other COVID testing of our diplomatic personnel – and that as many as two people were asked to submit to a test,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Our diplomatic personnel were harassed in a reprehensible way by the Chinese government, and the Biden administration seems to have done little in response – except to cover it up.” == == Judicial Watch The lawsuit relates that a bipartisan commission recommended a map to Maryland Governor Larry Hogan on November 5 that he approved, but the legislature passed a different proposal in a straight party-line vote. On December 9, 2021, Hogan vetoed this proposal, and, the same day, the state legislature overrode his veto on another party-line vote. == == Judicial Watch The appellate court reversed a lower court ruling that the Justice Department could withhold certain records under the Freedom of Information Act’s Exemption 5 “deliberative process privilege,” which can be used to keep secret “pre-decisional” agency records. The appeals court ordered the lower court to directly review the records at issue in camera to determine if they qualify for withholding as “deliberative.” == == == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

name: James Tarantin
subject: Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Fellow American, the values that made America great are the same one we need to defend today. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=566c99f87fb5416192fc6448de7194f1&_e=9O0_ZBOU6t7Wfy5OKf9S_hWLJUzOao_vxm27AOytSMqCiCuNbg0fqG6LHmnlSPO0gt95i9VdZEuo2DxUWcKHfg4gg6eOYGACxJeLXz716yB_fT7zvUwEAnY_eFQM56FbuWVhaeF0ksLSm_rbj2gJm0Qbt92cIpa_LgzqR-3Bdj9r1nyfarQ_eV5XBBpGsrPR0fh3O5rPVcfdSw08g2bVthWtz2QmthBYdS6sLyDPcfT1EDQmvSe6-Ng41sbrda4HpfbSdfJLrwejle_otsNipmZ2592cq9A_9F1sjGIXeRffiu6YU1InUWGLxSntosZZ6ezSQ0CD8IsTv7gY80nQXafrGv_-3bp_FUYfzVv8aGzYUgKkmz-Xqz4OX4CiXmRKyaeKxlnhNusfhayYyBvGr5Zz1ll9iYmZzQdEG74NIFOUUx0fdLCV66BB3mkm8M9WEIOnnrTI3fRuoBCNQk8RQT6x6ZJlmRwkvVCVSvrl1oM%3D)

It’s Christmas this weekend Fellow American,

**To many of us, Christmas is about the divine miracle that shows God is above all in this world.** It’s about celebrating the real reason for this holiday season along with the very Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States.

These values are the reason I got involved in politics. Christmas represents all of those values and shows us why we need to stand up for our beliefs. **I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate, and I’m running because even though we see Christmas as a miracle for everyone, many others see America as a miracle in this world.**

I believe that we cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical liberals like Ilhan Omar and Nancy Pelosi who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. [**We have to stand up for the values that made this nation great to begin with, and I need your help, Fellow American, to make that happen.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=566c99f87fb5416192fc6448de7194f1&_e=9O0_ZBOU6t7Wfy5OKf9S_hWLJUzOao_vxm27AOytSMqCiCuNbg0fqG6LHmnlSPO0gt95i9VdZEuo2DxUWcKHfg4gg6eOYGACxJeLXz716yB_fT7zvUwEAnY_eFQM56FbuWVhaeF0ksLSm_rbj2gJm0Qbt92cIpa_LgzqR-3Bdj9r1nyfarQ_eV5XBBpGsrPR0fh3O5rPVcfdSw08g2bVthWtz2QmthBYdS6sLyDPcfT1EDQmvSe6-Ng41sbrda4HpfbSdfJLrwejle_otsNiphC8lI5FrkmXtO4tmMvL4RpBetSwntD55Iu2SUHUVUVEtvJVYn9YC1aGfOf7V2SvDcVo8gqLPGlO9vC3IafLZdqcMSb36OvQxyUbSITUOTPj8Zvw90mu98AuHUtutBjXZQEHRbuSLi0pUpb-PVV3VNCuAHtnP7W_W0R7Vg-icADP6m7ZflOLhYkmCPsgI3WY_AjwnGycu867yPEDZn5au_s%3D)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN AND PROTECT THE VALUES THAT MAKE AMERICA GREAT **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=566c99f87fb5416192fc6448de7194f1&_e=9O0_ZBOU6t7Wfy5OKf9S_hWLJUzOao_vxm27AOytSMqCiCuNbg0fqG6LHmnlSPO0gt95i9VdZEuo2DxUWcKHfg4gg6eOYGACxJeLXz716yB_fT7zvUwEAnY_eFQM56FbuWVhaeF0ksLSm_rbj2gJm0Qbt92cIpa_LgzqR-3Bdj9r1nyfarQ_eV5XBBpGsrPR0fh3O5rPVcfdSw08g2bVthWtz2QmthBYdS6sLyDPcfT1EDQmvSe6-Ng41sbrda4HpfbSdfJLrwejle_otsNipnD4KL15l6EZ2CHJGGFb8PZYSmJVsmbrYBOAf-HC7CcEwRYijq-qqG0Q570n2Uou7o_bc4mlpa2sdwx_crA9wGwIiyKbqWaVuuTjFhCQ1UUhRaub1kZeDTT923bNE6QYnEKTHXKToPlrmYQup6cv97AspTqU0Yi-3_c6SlCTtZ5jXq0CNMTBu9zQ9KIJHMppuOrb_avH-KOl0rGgzk6A5Vw%3D)
**Regardless of how you celebrate Christmas, the values that Christmas represents are the same ones that made America great.** The radical liberals we’re dealing with today would never admit that, because Christmas to them is just a political talking point.

**Just look at the Biden administration. If they actually cared about the values that Christmas shows us, they wouldn’t be trying to befriend terrorist groups or governments that openly persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them.**

The people who want to see America fail, or who chant “death to America,” are the same people that these radical liberals want to befriend. These are the people that want to extinguish our values, and I don’t think you could ever support that, because neither could I.

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN AND PROTECT THE VALUES THAT MAKE AMERICA GREAT **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=566c99f87fb5416192fc6448de7194f1&_e=9O0_ZBOU6t7Wfy5OKf9S_hWLJUzOao_vxm27AOytSMqCiCuNbg0fqG6LHmnlSPO0gt95i9VdZEuo2DxUWcKHfg4gg6eOYGACxJeLXz716yB_fT7zvUwEAnY_eFQM56FbuWVhaeF0ksLSm_rbj2gJm0Qbt92cIpa_LgzqR-3Bdj9r1nyfarQ_eV5XBBpGsrPR0fh3O5rPVcfdSw08g2bVthWtz2QmthBYdS6sLyDPcfT1EDQmvSe6-Ng41sbrda4HpfbSdfJLrwejle_otsNipuHBitjvOETkujR3QZ5Dt4ItYCt-BjYTzQ05dTRa4ejKH76hOS9noenBj7ip150uiEe4ryXJdwoJS867IDhkzlge8hN163zBWHlVFA2bBJ3oYoqc9I5UmNweb0jr2eu_8XQQk0h2uQb-Zxo-I2ywrGaZzA8EX_8wYKVc2hIZSV6YQMUqgbCeavhIziEUd7pZVIHe7ixWdM3sZEsTYv6dm6E%3D)
**If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking, and we can get there by winning back the Senate majority.

[**Help me be the reason we win back the U.S. Senate by supporting my campaign to become the next Republican Senator from Maryland. If we can do that, then we can wholeheartedly defend and preserve the miracle that is America. I hope you’ll join me in making that a reality.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=566c99f87fb5416192fc6448de7194f1&_e=9O0_ZBOU6t7Wfy5OKf9S_hWLJUzOao_vxm27AOytSMqCiCuNbg0fqG6LHmnlSPO0gt95i9VdZEuo2DxUWcKHfg4gg6eOYGACxJeLXz716yB_fT7zvUwEAnY_eFQM56FbuWVhaeF0ksLSm_rbj2gJm0Qbt92cIpa_LgzqR-3Bdj9r1nyfarQ_eV5XBBpGsrPR0fh3O5rPVcfdSw08g2bVthWtz2QmthBYdS6sLyDPcfT1EDQmvSe6-Ng41sbrda4HpfbSdfJLrwejle_otsNipnckKEMdqTFdl8QXB2XRMerZ5aHcmsTkJ8vLnHlfH7odazpO4YL5wFaxEB8w7dq-HLYWs6XUxiImFPqV0Oxuq0j__uAc7v4bPOAnGGuR30vNcecx0QoATgEJTVmEVOZRoS4L8aWL5gQSaGoX9XvTL4BldaAMk2JAAK0hWzUsStYBSzcxdsZAid0IaTxj6ODuNiU_6MdAbuisDSG-mo7btqQ%3D)

Thank you, God bless, and Merry Christmas,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=566c99f87fb5416192fc6448de7194f1&_e=9O0_ZBOU6t7Wfy5OKf9S_hWLJUzOao_vxm27AOytSMqCiCuNbg0fqG6LHmnlSPO0gt95i9VdZEuo2DxUWcKHfg4gg6eOYGACxJeLXz716yB_fT7zvUwEAnY_eFQM56FbuWVhaeF0ksLSm_rbj2gJm0Qbt92cIpa_LgzqR-3Bdj9r1nyfarQ_eV5XBBpGsrPR0fh3O5rPVcfdSw08g2bVthWtz2QmthBYdS6sLyDPcfT1EDQmvSe6-Ng41sbrda4HpfbSdfJLrwejle_otsNipsBmy1zhY2b0W3I4W61G2SGFY2UGmLaaHWs1Ctg4s8UdWy-gqm4dzCE5MLDu-c1FPfjYyNMfNzXrWrWiq_numooR3-LP7u7aySdjezQN3TDHTtD6Aqerj9GvfDEZ3XtzvLK6ea1siw_U7lc7UvSsBLTyOIRbx5y1eSPK1EP4I-2OuKG2bDH9vQNpyikH79Rn5tIps6SSN3e4z43YW5dW2wE%3D)
**James Tarantin for U.S. Senate**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN AND PROTECT THE VALUES THAT MAKE AMERICA GREAT **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=566c99f87fb5416192fc6448de7194f1&_e=9O0_ZBOU6t7Wfy5OKf9S_hWLJUzOao_vxm27AOytSMqCiCuNbg0fqG6LHmnlSPO0gt95i9VdZEuo2DxUWcKHfg4gg6eOYGACxJeLXz716yB_fT7zvUwEAnY_eFQM56FbuWVhaeF0ksLSm_rbj2gJm0Qbt92cIpa_LgzqR-3Bdj9r1nyfarQ_eV5XBBpGsrPR0fh3O5rPVcfdSw08g2bVthWtz2QmthBYdS6sLyDPcfT1EDQmvSe6-Ng41sbrda4HpfbSdfJLrwejle_otsNipoDlb8ydi8ZRqBCD--pwan2N0VjhsN8b8Mahu2YEIxecCaTg6Bz-RkbwsdhvDgVvQGE3FyneQvXj60dtHcZplTNf3UtX8rsopOUsj1mlrCs2W0AYXY2g9kDdkHpsjjDIsGLZG4wp3f3A0sICGPw20eX_IBuYoV3dmtVNxccxY1yAvYw9f3EAg-ppmj4ILvL1WYUNKkjLvp-u6GAb1OrGcBA%3D)

| | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BQ7LPn&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EzvJtBm&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/1cad09e6-c313-4c93-929d-633ff4bef3c5.jpg]

Merry Christmas from the Culp Family!

December 25th, 1776 George Washington along with the Continental Army braved freezing rain, snow, and high winds to cross the Delaware.

The American Army had been suffering numerous losses at the hands of the British forces and it seemed that defeat would be inevitable. New York was nowcontrolled by the British and it was the largest city in the colonies and a major port. New Jersey had been conquered and the Continental Congress was fleeing Philadelphia expecting that the British would soon move on that city.

But George Washington wouldn't give up.

He took his troops on a journey across the turbulent waters of the Delaware, knowing that the American people needed a victory and to see that the Revolution wasn't over.

Washington led his worn troops into Trenton and caught the Hessians (German troops who were hired by the British) off guard and wasable to capture nearly 1,000 men with only 4 American casualties.

Because of Washington's exceptionalism, morale was restored and hope put into the hearts of American patriots everywhere.

The following weeks lead to more American victories and proved that the American people could defeat the British Army which at the time was the most powerful force in the world.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/9b1e80c2-d175-4f8c-ab0b-469036c6a049.png]

In this country we get to celebrate Christmas and honor God because of the sacrifices of Americans who had a vision of freedom for every human being.

I'm grateful for our country and I take the responsibility of protecting our freedoms seriously. It's up to us to insure that America remains free. As we celebrate Christmas and the joy of this season, let's say a prayer of gratitude for the brave Americans, who on a cold Christmas morning 225 years ago fought for freedom.

Merry Christmas! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SPPrnE&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhU7Gc4&]

Loren

name: Dolan For Ohio
subject: #OhioFirst Week in Review
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc
body:
No images? [Click here](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-e-bxeil-idulfldlt-m/) [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-r/)
**#OhioFirst Week in Review **
December 24, 2021Merry Christmas Eve from the #OhioFirst team! This was another busy week on the trail for Matt and the entire Dolan for Ohio campaign team. Last weekend came news that Joe Biden's reckless #BuildBackBroke agenda was derailed in the U.S. Senate. Matt wasted no time in laying the stakes of what is to come: [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-y/) Matt was also quick to highlight Tim Ryan's response encouraging Manchin to backtrack and pass the radical tax and spending bill. Matt called out Tim Ryan for siding with Joe Biden and the Squad instead of his Ohio constituents. [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-j/) What's clear about the Democrats' failure to pass BBB, is that it was never tied to the commonsense, targeted infrastructure bill that was negotiated and passed by Senator Rob Portman last summer. Every other Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate opposed the funding and jobs that will be headed to Ohio to improve the quality of our roads, bridges, airports, rail and broadband. Matt discussed this and other important topics in detail with Hugh Hewitt on his national radio program this week. [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-t/) You can listen to the entire nationally syndicated radio interview by clicking [HERE](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-i/). Grassroots supporters and reporters across Ohio took note of Matt's appeal for stronger border security and standing up for the Constitution. Matt views these as policy items of central importance to his candidacy. [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-d/) Following a full slate of supporter meetings in Cincinnati on Monday, Matt capped off the day in Powell at the Dublin Republican Club's Christmas Party. He shared his thanks with Club President Shawn Parker for hosting a festive and patriotic celebration! This week, Matt also attended the American Nationalities Movement's celebration of Christmas in Parma. Matt said they were a fantastic organization that celebrates and appreciates America's freedom all year round. From Matt and the #OhioFirst campaign team, we hope everyone has a safe and very Merry Christmas with their family and friends. We will see you in the New Year!
-The #OhioFirst Team [Donate Here](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-h/) [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-k/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-u/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-p/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bxeil-idulfldlt-x/) | Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc. [Preferences](https://dolanforohioinc.updatemyprofile.com/y-bxeil-FC066A9E-idulfldlt-c) | [Unsubscribe](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-u-bxeil-idulfldlt-q/)
---

It has been enough support to propel me to the front of a crowded Republican field.

Our work is only just beginning, and a small donation from you will help ensure I stay in the lead. [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=The+Season+of+Giving%21]

name: Jake Evans
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
During this special time of year, while we gather...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friend,
During this special time of year, while we gather as families and friends to celebrate the birth of our Savior, Baylie and I would like to wish you a very Merry Christmas. May today bring you warmth, happiness and a touch of Christmas magic.
---
---
"Mary wrapped him in cloths and placed him in a manger, because there was no guest room available for them. And there were shepherds living out in the fields nearby, keeping watch over their flocks at night. An angel of the Lord appeared to them, and the glory of the Lord shone around them, and they were terrified. But the angel said to them, 'Do not be afraid. I bring you good news that will cause great joy for all the people. Today in the town of David a Savior has been born to you; he is the Messiah, the Lord. This will be a sign to you: You will find a baby wrapped in cloths and lying in a manger.' Suddenly a great company of the heavenly host appeared with the angel, praising God and saying, 'Glory to God in the highest heaven, and on earth peace to those on whom his favor rests.'" \-- Luke 2: 7-14
Sincerely,
Jake Evans GOP Candidate for GA-6
---
|
---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rebekah=20Jones?=
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!
body:
| | | |
---
|
## **Merry Christmas
Florida Family and Supporters!**

I learned a lot in 2021 about the strength and resilience of a community rallied behind a common cause. Your support, courage and kindness brought warmth and light to my family in an otherwise cold and dark year.

The notes of encouragement and love our family has received – thousands now with more coming each day – have empowered my kids to carry a message of hope as they grow up, instead of a message of fear and hate, despite the trauma they endured.

As a mother and proud Floridian, thank you for fighting with me. As the next Congresswoman from Florida’s 1stDistrict, thank you for all we’re going to do in 2022.

**_Cheers and warmth to you and yours,
Rebekah, Jacob, Jackson, Evelyn and Leesi_**

---
|
---
|

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Christ Is Born! Merry Christmas
body:
Merry Christmas! The sights, smells and songs added with the family traditions make this time of the year so special. There is nothing quite like Ch
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2006030.1186.1.d1f38195e323d15b18859e5c0bd2f395) |
---
## Merry Christmas!
---
The **sights** , **smells** and **songs** added with the **family traditions** make this time of the year so special. There is nothing quite like Christmas. Celebrating the **birth of Jesus** is interwoven into our great American heritage. It’s important that we continue to _remember the reason for this great season_ that we all love and enjoy. **Christ is born**. **Merry Christmas from the Lahmeyer family!** Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2006030.1187.1.ab64b24edc05254324d2e5355d0cf88c), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2006030.1188.1.0115f4bd73102e6e600b64507c653144), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2006030.1189.1.67ff3324ac76776bd6e1570922816cc3), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2006030.1190.1.7fc14dc81ccea22189624cca9abbc084), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2006030.1191.1.e585100bb678e11d2fd6ce7196d4d5ae)).
---
---
| | [ www.jacksonlahmeyer.com ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2006030.1192.1.6716678f1a322383d0c36f02f2e233ed)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
_Sponsored message_

But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znubl09ef5h5fct5540tb8nir2gs6nqdtpl0ffb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p33clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5nrj6p33fhv6g32medoerg2gm2lrgce73g593to_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p33clh2bs)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh0l00lci1932njpd755ge89sikq1m4i2d16vsoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p33clh2bs)

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze5n4nciejne39hfr887l21cq5qrov5rmvgp8qqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p33clh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zka2f39oo2quqgsk0f3dkqf08l32vqhem57790ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p33clh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcpjgasvge6dpksiol6gdbqdfo4f3grkqvhfq4u0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p33clh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zktp5ahkngsehfal4sdskd9gki5pshi2thrh3rlg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p33clh2bs)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That’s why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z26jqmcd81glqavjgqpv2738hfbg9cnngd6mhte8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j60p33clh2bs)
---
Thank you,

| Friend,
From my family to yours, we wish you a blessed Christmas!
On such a special day like this, it's important to remember the kindness and compassion of our family and loved ones.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-7nELRLtL-Pe4csyGq3pRiRdMZhtLztWSUhzPVN467K4IBRzm2a7zeYC0tjLUD1rE1amvKJBMa4wkKgI5SSnOTXjl6oNDHMdi1i5puJf1gyHSXvSyUzxKYaKOfRzw8X89juhksCnpve76b-f_S59GXpVfY_FFZvT&c=8FNTWrNie5Nr98iWy9naKZIRujKV5MoSkNqAxFW-jBf7YsAR7YsT4A==&ch=hcg35u1FAdWvllwrGMSNHGleUQ7JK2TgAXVOREkvrtzMCGAZiVFuqA==)
---
| Despite the current political climate of today, always remember to hold these special times close to your heart. We will take back the House and secure the future of our country.
We are determined in this fight and we will succeed thanks to the support from patriots like you.
Thank you again and have a Merry Christmas!
Have a blessed Christmas,

name: Nathan Dahm
subject: Merry Christmas from Christina & Nathan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Dahm for Senate** ](https://em
body:
Peter, We wanted to wish you a Merry Christmas. While we acknowledge that Christmas has become very commercialized with the giving & receiving...
| [ ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VVL1Mn3Lk6C7W4ZnvRK6JcbsXVNrtzX4Cv-qLN7qyk_G3lLB3V1-WJV7CgBRPVzhn843ZDTg2W4_D13k8rGv9tW9gwQH35DHDs3W4QmZ-B7PXrzgW4NdJtX51C8MpN3KMvTJLGy1gW4GpCqT6tPMXcW3rNrnN46JRs-N4Mb9xnBKq9wW6YzRVz85TX24W1vLC323GnPmwMdhZHPzdbn_W76JDm886YQwBW3lHVyT92bD9GN9hPkG466wQ3W2bKqH61my8JrW5XrGX61jKbTwW4-_WLt3NJVc9W6VK-j6614hKBW2ZvtMX2QrM8j371x1)
---
Peter,

We wanted to wish you a Merry Christmas. While we acknowledge that Christmas has become very commercialized with the giving & receiving of gifts, we must remember the ultimate reason for this holiday season is the greatest gift that was ever given: salvation through Jesus Christ!

The child born in the manger fulfilled numerous prophecies concerning the coming Messiah with His birth & throughout His life. And while His ultimate sacrifice happened years later, it started with His miracle birth that we celebrate each December 25th. Christina & I are excited to be celebrating this Christmas as our first one together as newlyweds creating traditions for our own family. We realize that some people may not have those same opportunities to celebrate with their family, and for those who may feel alone we encourage you to realize that you can become a part of God's heavenly family if you accept Jesus as your Savior. If you've already made this decision, we celebrate being a part of that family together with you.[](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VVL1Mn3Lk6C7W4ZnvRK6JcbsXVNrtzX4Cv-qLN7qyk_Z3lLBmV1-WJV7CgVTBVcNWq95K6CW5W6l0RGD5ydy2gW6FJfBG42RKLTW16ZPCL7n-JTPW8dl1cG6xHyGbW8ZGVmX7whx31W71Jn_z25n__HW2J6RQ58VYk1rV_0dyQ6dv4KqW8cZdK11q3Cw9Vw3r7b81yXVcN1bhnGdlPnr3W67rMKs85S0MgW3FxnTf7VDMnbTttXs26-3MMW3QGJfT3QYfP_W1xmlqG6dPCT6W2Hzvrk53V_HfW17SShY26wKX9W4qwJ0_3Bv9_hN93KKgCWdySDW5DrjVJ15F9zw326_1) Our prayer for all of you is that during this season you may all experience the love of God personally for yourself. For God so loved the world that he sent his only begotten son. He shall be called Immanuel, prince of Peace, Almighty God. In Him we put our reliance & trust, and we hope you are able to do so as well. So once again we wish you a very blesses & merry CHRISTmas & a happy & prosperous New Year. -Nathan & Christina Dahm
---

Hey there, supporters – I wanted to stop and say I’m wishing you and your family a safe, warm, and joyous holiday season. Today is a day of gratitude, and I’m thankful for having support from a dedicated and engaged team that’s ready to see our government work for all of us again – not just one political party’s agenda. I know there are many challenges ahead, like getting businesses back up and running, supporting parents through school openings and closings, and protecting our constitutional right to vote. But we can face them together. Our journey to 2022 won’t be easy, but the promise we've shown so far has me excited to see what next year has in store. We’ve proven that we are strong, and I know that with you on my team, we are set to bring real leadership back to our district. Thank you so much for all that you’ve done to make this moment possible. Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!

\--- Eugene
---
---

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: a sense of hopefulness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40014584/322454556/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTUwYzgyNC04ZjY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymRgecrY0gSyXXqHWUzMMqeqPamj08AjD0onfBuGl7E=&emci=9dcf23b5-3c64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=6950c824-8f65-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40014585/322454557/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTUwYzgyNC04ZjY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymRgecrY0gSyXXqHWUzMMqeqPamj08AjD0onfBuGl7E=&emci=9dcf23b5-3c64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=6950c824-8f65-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
As we close out another year, I can’t help but feel a sense of hopefulness.
I know it’s been another hard year. For far too many, there’s now an empty chair at the dinner table. The Omicron variant continues to rage throughout the country and it feels as if nothing will change, even during this time of cheer.
For me, the Holiday Season represents a feeling of hope and happiness. Surrounded by my family, perennial friends, and a few new acquaintances, we are celebrating both Christmas today and optimism for tomorrow.
We _can_ come out of this pandemic a better and stronger nation. We _can_ protect and strengthen our democracy. We _can_ combat the climate crisis, pass common sense gun reform, and take on Big Pharma and Wall Street. And we _can_ expand our Democratic majority in the Senate – starting with defeating Chuck Grassley here in Iowa.
Will any of these things be easy? Of course not. Few things truly worth doing come easy. But that doesn’t mean we shy away from the fight.
So whether you and your family are celebrating Christmas today or enjoying some other aspect of the Holiday Season, I wish you all a sense of hopefulness and happiness in 2022. There is no end to what we can accomplish together.
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
_Editor’s note: Careful with the eggnog._
__

name: Susie Lee
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
Merry Christmas from Susie Lee!

Team —

From myself and everyone in the Lee household, we’re wishing you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas.

Like so many families across the district, we just finished up our morning routine of exchanging presents (and then picking up all of the scattered wrapping paper!). And while getting a nice gift from someone you love can mean a lot, it’s the time we get to spend together that makes Christmas so special.

Now, I’m on breakfast duty ( it’ll probably be pancakes ), so I have to run!

Once again, from my family and myself, we’re wishing you a safe, healthy, and Merry Christmas.

Warmly,

Susie Lee

clean_body: Merry Christmas from Susie Lee! Team — From myself and everyone in the Lee household, we’re wishing you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas. Like so many families across the district, we just finished up our morning routine of exchanging presents (and then picking up all of the scattered wrapping paper!). And while getting a nice gift from someone you love can mean a lot, it’s the time we get to spend together that makes Christmas so special. Now, I’m on breakfast duty ( it’ll probably be pancakes ), so I have to run! Once again, from my family and myself, we’re wishing you a safe, healthy, and Merry Christmas. Warmly, Susie Lee

body:
I hope you have had a happy and safe holiday season – whether you are celebrating today, or if you have already celebrated.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40016537/322463784/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_info_2021.12.25_b1_holiday_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTQ5NWU1NS05MzY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSkg4yzzLogOU_EDPwJN7lPGGYSrHm_ieKCA4bRYMOI=)

I hope you have had a happy and safe holiday season – whether you are celebrating today, or if you have already celebrated.

For many of us, this year has been difficult. And once again, many of us find that we are unable to be with family. I pray that we all find the health and happiness we are all searching for in 2022.

But despite the hardships, I wanted to take a minute to thank you for being on my team. I can think of no greater gift than having you on this journey with me.

So no matter how you celebrate, I hope you have a wonderful holiday. Enjoy the day, and may the rest of 2021 (and 2022!) be merry and bright.

\- Brad

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Rejoice! Rejoice! A Savior is born
body:
**_For to us a child is born,_** **_ to us a son is given,_** **_ and the government will be on his shoulders._** **_And he will be called_** **_ Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God,_** **_ Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace._** **Isaiah 9:6 NIV** | |
---
This Christmas season, I have thought about Herod and his role in the story of Christmas more than usual.

His desire for power and refusal to humble himself, to acknowledge that he was not the ultimate authority, is all too familiar. The very real tyranny we face, from Biden to Congress, from bureaucrats to state officials, comes from the same arrogance that afflicted Herod.

They, like Herod, believe _themselves_ to be the highest authority, and it infuriates them to the core when we reject their demands to worship them.

_The Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us. We have seen his glory, the glory of the one and only Son, who came from the Father, full of grace and truth._
John 1:14 NIV

When Herod heard that the King of Kings was going to be born, it disturbed him greatly to learn that he was outranked. In the same way, those in power today also can’t accept that Jesus Christ is our Lord and Savior, and that they are not.

The people alive at the time of Jesus’ birth anxiously waited for the Messiah to arrive. We, on the other hand, do not have to wait! We can rejoice in His birth, and His life, death and resurrection!

**So, this Christmas, I pray you can celebrate the gift of Jesus Christ and the salvation He offers, and that you will live your life with the peace that comes from knowing that He alone is Lord of Lords and King of Kings.**

This is the hope and joy that we can and must carry with us into the new year, every day, no matter how much today’s earthly Kings oppress and persecute.

_Of the greatness of his government and peace_
_ there will be no end._
_He will reign on David’s throne_
_ and over his kingdom,_
_establishing and upholding it_
_ with justice and righteousness_
_ from that time on and forever._
_The zeal of the Lord Almighty_
_ will accomplish this._
Isaiah 9:7 NIV

Merry Christmas my friend!

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---

name: American Update
subject: We must engage them aggressively
body:
Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8233%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sHnWbM4uI%2fDnF%2fmew19zcQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10464%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mluP55WhFflPFNVBUPShnA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. Today it asserts itself in many forms--including critical race theory--in our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the media, in sports, and even in our military. The recent election in Virginia brought the corruption of American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national conversation. The breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed patriotism--without which self-government is impossible--is not something we can allow to continue. While there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead. **Education is where this attack on America began --and it is the battlefield on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government. ** Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale’s mission, to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost. That’s why we have set a goal to raise $5.5 million online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we need your help. The** ** project has three key objectives:
1. _**Expand**_ the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.

2. _**Increase**_ the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,” “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” and our newest course, “American Citizenship and Its Decline” with Victor Davis Hanson.

3. _**Launch**_** ** additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the new **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here’s why... As I’ve written to you in the past, Hillsdale College** conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty**--as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. This is the range in which most supporters give. We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we only have days remaining in 2021 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help. **You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/calendar-year-end-2021](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10475%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MCcxPNLhH6MwkEg9HMMvog&sysid=1)** As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage them ever more aggressively--including on the central battlefield of education. That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift before our December 31 deadline. Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5.5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions **in 2022. Thank you for your generosity. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us by making a tax-deductible, year-end gift before December 31. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans. Please renew your support today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8233%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sHnWbM4uI%2fDnF%2fmew19zcQ&sysid=1)_

name: Roger Stone
subject: Merry Christmas from Roger and Nydia Stone
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | [ ](www.stonecoldtruth.com)
---
| | | [ ](www.stonecoldtruth.com)
---
| |
## Dear American Patriot,
I would like to extend to you and your family a Merry Christmas! The holidays are a special time where we come together through our cherished connections with friends and family. While we value these times above all else, we must not forget the patriots fighting for our country, and how their collective effort is what allows us to celebrate the birth of Christ in the greatest country on earth.

We are the patriots of today and tomorrow, and while our hearts are filled with holiday cheer, we must always remember and focus on the continuing struggle to maintain our rights and freedoms. As a gift for embarking with me on this journey, in many cases to restore and defend our rights, I would like to extend to you a special discount for all orders on [StoneColdTruth.com](www.stonecoldtruth.com/shop). Enter the code "**Christmas21** " and you will receive **15%** off your order of $50 or more up until 12/29.

Nydia and I are both greatly appreciative of all the support we have received, so it's a small thank you for a favor we could never repay. While we meticulously undertake the ongoing battle to overcome, we are faced with enemies attacking me and my family through corruption in our legal system. The endless waste of the American tax dollars used to defame and attack me has been both malicious and impactful. With this in mind, again, thank you for all your support and I hope you enjoy your holidays.

God Bless and have a Merry Christmas!

**_Roger & Nydia Stone_**

The holidays are a special time where we come together through our cherished connections with friends and family. While we value these times above all else, we must not forget the patriots fighting for our country, and how their collective effort is what allows us to celebrate the birth of Christ in the greatest country on earth. We are the patriots of today and tomorrow, and while our hearts are filled with holiday cheer, we must always remember and focus on the continuing struggle to maintain our rights and freedoms. As a gift for embarking with me on this journey, in many cases to restore and defend our rights, I would like to extend to you a special discount for all orders on www.stonecoldtruth.com/shop. Enter the code "Christmas21 " and you will receive 15% off your order of $50 or more up until 12/29. Nydia and I are both greatly appreciative of all the support we have received, so it's a small thank you for a favor we could never repay. While we meticulously undertake the ongoing battle to overcome, we are faced with enemies attacking me and my family through corruption in our legal system. The endless waste of the American tax dollars used to defame and attack me has been both malicious and impactful. With this in mind, again, thank you for all your support and I hope you enjoy your holidays. God Bless and have a Merry Christmas! Happy Holidays, Peter!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40018550/322473998/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk530-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQ1ZjUzNS05ODY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x49OjMURfAjMOL1eZ11aFZxQ3glhmRzxsaOfrp0KH1U=)
It’s Christmas Day in the Finkenauer Wasta household, and it's hard to believe that the new year is just a few short days away. But here we are exchanging gifts, bundling up in festive sweaters and planning out our new year's resolutions!
Daniel and I are also spending these last few days of the year reflecting on 2021 – and it's certainly been one for the books.
I know that this year hasn't been easy for many of us, but I hope that you and your family had plenty of joyful moments to celebrate. Here at our home, many of our most hopeful moments have been possible because of you.
Running for Senate is certainly no walk in the park, but I've never felt alone in this fight. Because of your constant support, I've always known that you've had my back through thick and thin. This grassroots team is powerful, and I'm so incredibly grateful for all that you've done for me and this campaign.
This holiday season, I hope that you and your family are reflecting on similar memories from the past year that fill you with joy and hope for the future.
Wherever you are and however you celebrate this season, Daniel and I are sending you gratitude, warm wishes, peace and love. Thank you and happy holidays.
All our best,

Abby and Daniel
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Troy Nehls
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Hope you and your family have a wonderful Christmas. Read more.
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/d5420925dd4c95ba/03870d4ba7b3068fc3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
Merry Christmas, Friend! My family and I are excited to take a brief break from the campaign trail. And we’re enjoying our time together celebrating the birth of Christ. It’s so important that we count our blessings on this special day, and remember what truly matters most in this life: faith, family, and freedom. So, in the spirit of this holiday, I hope you’ll join us in offering up a prayer for the brave men and women who are serving our country overseas and unable to spend this special day with their loved ones. Thank you for your continued support, and I wish you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas! Troy Nehls
---

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Liberals have lost their minds – butthere’s hope
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the Un
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1dp09a07oh4ltjaef76tidipt2esolh17v1b40o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5iuuu5cqrncibo6bkh2dn1e8tbq9teoomt62n50_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4706dcmkb88ip5d150al0hd2eliiqgpeb2pbl6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpppuqa38kvv5pqp9s6hb6cs2b3ftinju0q9ga8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu78m3gskdrvktv5dkjdeurnljc8j17rctjsjik8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr3dggferduedocdiv33c4p2un35uejvqm73n7t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0fti8c5crs54re8fi4bt1ei8gc6sl5g03lou0p0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztb41llkmb7dsni15caubdvn63ne7r9u462jfa1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7f59gcg39diiod7elh5ggmd1ndr2h3lairj45t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5j6cp70c9h2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6p5gacprrncfkasubvcsbtqctf1hhdd259rk17o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1c1gmcpj4s1h649fg)

I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help. Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,Resistance is Futile. It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because if we lose the kids, we lose this country. Thank you.** | | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Heidi St. John
subject: *Reminder* Christmas Greetings From The St. John Family
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Merry Christmas, everyone!
I heard a rumor... we may have a white Christmas in SW Washington! What a gift--and just in time. As we take a moment to pause and reflect on all we have to be thankful for this Christmas-- our families, our faith and the freedom that we have long enjoyed--I hope you feel a sense of hope. I know I do. After all, Christmas is about hope, isn't it? Christmas reminds us that love is still the greatest force on earth. According to the Bible, those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength (Isaiah 40:31)--and we need a renewal of strength in our nation and in our state right now. The battle is fierce. It's true that things are hard for many Americans right now--but we are a resilient people and I truly believe that as we work together, and as we seek the Lord for guidance, our best days are still ahead of us. This Christmas, I pray we take inventory of our blessings as a nation and commit to returning once more to the foundational principles that made the United States the most free and prosperous nation on earth; starting with a renewed commitment to pursuing freedom as "one nation, under God, indivisible ... with liberty and justice for all." Oh, how I love this beautiful country! I am committed to being part of a renewal of the American spirit in 2022--and to that end, we are building a grassroots movement that will send a message all across America that here in Washington State, the American spirit is alive and well. We do have a battle ahead of us--but for the next few days, I hope we enjoy the blessings of liberty, even as we prepare to rally together in defense of them. My grandchildren and all seven of our children and their spouses will be with us at our home in Battle Ground this year. I can't wait to have everyone under one roof. As the delightful Andy Rooney once said, "One of the most glorious messes in the world is the mess created in the living room on Christmas Day. Don't clean it up too quickly." I wish you the rest, hope and the joy of Christmas this year, my friends.
The best really is yet to come. Merry Christmas.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| AmericaFest 2021

| Peter -
---
| Merry Christmas!
There are those who would try to shame us out of saying those two words. Hence, once more, MERRY CHRISTMAS!
At this time of year, we celebrate not only Christ's birth, but all which is good and true - charity, family, love, and hope.
These are the beliefs that make it worth our time to participate in politics, and the beliefs which should always be our goal to protect.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MSmzdAdijvIMvTJs5xI0rCBpAsA2BoAJzD-ITiQgCGUWwyc6UKEL3VHcsXWuOWBsQsqEgQBUrBfzhCGxSHbNcPI2LtbjfrE6hAIG-sju0IlqDnkAS_TB5Wqd1VKCC3AkN6JDQYGoSg66cZoEJvC59w==&c=WMFCgmJdaR3YuNn4R2qzea5tSXqS8ZDgyX1p_CBNLJIO43fgY9BgjQ==&ch=9ReZvuPStWNraS4tXL32nozQdMrRy0cdoES325v6fhMpx8iABg9jhA==)
---
| But we also need to take some time to enjoy them. So this Christmas season, gather your loved ones close, enjoy these precious moments, and give thanks for all the God-given blessings we have received. I know I certainly will!
From myself, my family, and Team Kathy, a very merry Christmas to you!
---
|
---
| Kathy Barnette

With your help, we can make sure that my campaign in 2022 is successful and that Marjorie Taylor Greene is out of Congress for good! Thanks and have a great rest of your day, Marcus Flowers | Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. | = **** **** ****** ** ** **** Paid for by Marcus for Georgia Marcus for Georgia PO Box 725 Bremen, GA 30110 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ********=**

subject: Happy holidays!

body:
From the bottom of my heart, I'd like to wish you and yours a happy holiday season.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40019018/322478003/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1832-ot-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ3MmNiNy05YjY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXP1EBgrpR6sQe5CUC5bLsfsQOunIBl8NgU40spaF7U=)

Friend,

From the bottom of my heart, I'd like to wish you and yours a happy holiday season.
This is a special time of year for my family and me, as it is for so many Americans. There's nothing quite like the joy, the warmth and the hope that the holiday season brings.
**This year is particularly special: After so many of us spent the holidays apart, we can now safely gather with our loved ones to celebrate.**
The pandemic has made this year difficult for so many, but we've come a long way, and I know there are even brighter days on the horizon.
Thank you for sticking with me through thick and thin, friend. I hope that you are able to celebrate your resilience this holiday season.
See you in the new year,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40019019/322478004/1581265324?refcode=jtk1832-ot-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ3MmNiNy05YjY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXP1EBgrpR6sQe5CUC5bLsfsQOunIBl8NgU40spaF7U=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. name: Ted Deutch
subject: Warm Holiday Greetings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Deutch for Congress
body:
| Friends — As you and your families gather together this year for Christmas or just to enjoy the holiday season, I wish you joy, peace and good health.

During the holiday season, I always reflect on our community’s meaningful work supporting those who need uplifting and the opportunity we all have to make a difference. I am especially grateful to those who donate food, gifts, and financial support to organizations helping our neighbors in need.

Your work spreading happiness and hope is so vital to our South Florida community.

Wishing you a happy, safe, and healthy Christmas and holiday season this year,

Ted

name: Ken Russell
subject: Happiest of Holidays
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
https://kenrussellforflorida.com/ [https://kenrussellforflorida.com/]Hey team,
I wanted to reach out and wish a very happy holiday to every Floridian across the state. There are so many holidays across cultures and faiths in December and January. Our richness and diversity is what makes us strong. It’s why I love Florida and why I am SO proud to be an American. Everyone is welcome here, regardless of faith or background. It makes America, well, America.
I will be spending the holidays with those closest to me. Cherishing the moments I have with my children and wife is exactly why this is my favorite time of the year. I hope you have a joyful time participating in whatever celebrations you find meaningful.
Warm wishes,
Ken Russell
PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA

328 Crandon Blvd.
Suite 119
#157
Key Biscayne, FL 33149
United States

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xTPywZWg-J9xAuG2qGRV2v8eA5y0tlHMO71qDFBU7YTEvstXYnqqsTEYDMSUJDy4s6eeN7g61brkZCqaZvHgllItLpGyFMNau5wJcjQP31we09is3_2cJZpogoE87UpEEjmZ-ESSLVMF9_h9qTPicA==&c=znwvW-8sFheJl9xoMA0J0X7lkP-4Op0ef1ZHykRf0TU7CeEPlO9qwA==&ch=r9Msn-RPwjnO9v8l7738rUMyAP59otJ35EMO-xXp63jQRbahnTNxIw==)

| "The angel said to them, "Do not be afraid. I bring you good news that will cause great joy for all the people. Today in the town of David a Savior has been born to you; he is the Messiah, the Lord." Luke 2:10-11
---
|
As we gather with loved ones over the holiday, I personally want to wish you a very Merry Christmas.
I hope that you spend time reflecting on the gift and miracle of Jesus Christ coming to earth. I am so grateful for the gift of salvation and the time set aside to remember the true reason we have this holiday season.
I want to extend an extra special thanks to our servicemen and women who are not with their families as they fight to protect the freedoms we hold so dear. Thank you for your sacrifice this Christmas.
I hope your day is filled with love, peace and fulfillment.

Merry Christmas,
Christian Collins

Merry Christmas from all of us on the campaign trail!
-Sheriff Joe Lombardo and Team

subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, when Marjorie Taylor Greene got elected in 2020, the circumstances were bleak.
Marge was ramping up her hateful rhetoric and the only democrat in the race was forced to drop out weeks before the election. This left Marjorie Taylor Greene with a wide open lane to the Halls of Congress. However, the democratic challenger still got 25% of the vote despite no longer running.
Let’s be honest folks, GA-14 democrats were scared and had nowhere to turn in 2020. That won’t be the case in 2022. If a candidate who dropped out got 25% of the vote, imagine what our campaign is capable of.
GA-14 cannot have a repeat of 2020. The same folks who voted for Marge were since abandoned and left in the dust. The atmosphere has shifted and we’re going into 2022 ready to fight.
Team Holly knows this won’t be easy by any means. That’s why we have launched the biggest voter registration program GA-14 has ever seen. The ground work we’ve been doing to flip moderates, outreach voters, and register democrats is how we’re going to win this race. Chip in $14 today, and together we can provide Northwest Georgia with true leadership. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1216]
Thanks so much,
Team Holly.

subject: Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40020617/322489462/993346776?refcode=em_msg_2021.12.25_b1_TOH_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzg0ZjFkOC1hODY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Qp4tm5bornG40gmtK54tjLIMmEBTME_TsRsy5O76EY=)** Hello friends -- I wanted to take this moment to wish everyone Happy Holidays and Merry Christmas. This time of year is the best time to reflect on how our year went and how we can do better in the next. It’s a time to be around family and friends, and enjoy the best of this holiday with each other. And it’s a time to be thankful for all of those who have helped us throughout the year, and to recommit to helping others, especially those who are less fortunate than we are. Friends, I hope you take this time to share gratitude with your friends and family. And as always, thank you for all your support. I’m so proud to have you on my team. Merry Christmas, Tom O’Halleran
---
****_Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today._**

clean_body: = Hello friends -- I wanted to take this moment to wish everyone Happy Holidays and Merry Christmas. This time of year is the best time to reflect on how our year went and how we can do better in the next. It’s a time to be around family and friends, and enjoy the best of this holiday with each other. And it’s a time to be thankful for all of those who have helped us throughout the year, and to recommit to helping others, especially those who are less fortunate than we are. Friends, I hope you take this time to share gratitude with your friends and family. And as always, thank you for all your support. I’m so proud to have you on my team. Merry Christmas, Tom O’Halleran **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

name: Nate Sandvig & Team Sandvig
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/cf33a165c4d72d6f/f4cb76f5079c6370c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Merry Christmas, Friends!

I hope you had a great Christmas Eve, and have special plans for a wonderful day today.

This is such a special time of year, when we have the opportunity to slow down for a bit, reflect on our many blessings, and spend quality time with those we care about the most.

**From all of us here at Team Sandvig, we want to wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year ahead!**
---
---
We want to express our sincere gratitude for your prayers, encouragement, and support, as Nate runs to stop the insanity in Washington and get our great nation back on track.

We are BLESSED to be Americans... and we must never forget it.

We hope you enjoy a wonderful Christmas today!

\- Nate Sandvig & Team Sandvig
---

name: Aramis Ayala
subject: Thinking of you this holiday season, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Aramis Ayala for Congress
body:
During this holiday season we embrace the opportunity to celebrate the diversity of our country and how the many faiths and cultures commune and celebrate.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40020704/322490394/619242359?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.12.21_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_info_2021.12.25_b1_holiday_x_f1_s1__ac1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzg0YjA3YS1hYzY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rLlwFpGiPvGr8FuGnsxoFkHw8Z7Oi4z8el451zD_KKc=)
---
Peter,

During this holiday season we embrace the opportunity to celebrate the diversity of our country and how the many faiths and cultures commune and celebrate. Giving reverence to others allows us to learn from them. Whatever your faith and whatever brings you peace, love, and joy, I pray that for you and your loved ones.

I’m so grateful to be with my family this year and making memories that will last my kids a lifetime. At our Christmas table we will focus on our faith and the hope this season brings. We will give thanks for the many blessings we receive.

I’m also proud to celebrate the first night of Kwanzaa with my family tomorrow. Kwanza is a tradition that has deep meaning for me and my family.

I know that I am fortunate to be able to do this. For many of us, this time of year will once again be hard as we are unable to spend time with family and loved ones. If you find yourself alone this holiday season, know that you are in my thoughts.

I hope you all are able to find peace and joy in this holiday season. I’m thankful to all of you who have stood by me on this campaign, and I’m looking forward to having even more to celebrate in 2022.

Merry Christmas,
Aramis
| | Paid for by Aramis Ayala for Congress. Aramis Ayala for Congress
P.O. Box 691581
Orlando, FL 32869
United States

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Wishing you a very blessed and Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
A message from Mark

Dear Peter,

Krysty, Ava, Ella and I would like to wish you a very Merry Christmas!

I fully realize that we live in a world that seems more fractured than ever
before. Politics too often become a substitute for faith. I pray that we as a
campaign family never lose sight of the meaning of Christ’s birth and His path
for our life. It is that faith that will carry us through. I firmly believe God
puts us all in a special place to make a difference for Him. It’s on us to pick
up that mantle and follow our personal walk through Him.

I know that in 2022 we will all have a chance to truly make a difference in
this state. Leading the life that Christ laid out for us is never easy, but it
is worth every step. Please know that even though I can’t always be there to
say it personally, I feel so fortunate to have your support.

May God bless you and your family this Christmas! Here’s to an exciting 2022!

–Mark

Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Merry Christmas From Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
| |
---
**MERRY CHRISTMAS**

---
| **There is nothing quite like Christmas. Celebrating the birth of Jesus is interwoven into our great American heritage. It 's important that we continue to remember the reason for this great season that we all love and enjoy. Christ is born. Our nation was founded on His principles. Today we must re-dedicate ourselves to preserving and defending them. God Bless You.** **Merry Christmas from Jackson, Kendra the Lahmeyer family.**
---

It 's important that we continue to remember the reason for this great season that we all love and enjoy. Christ is born. Our nation was founded on His principles. Today we must re-dedicate ourselves to preserving and defending them. God Bless You. Merry Christmas from Jackson, Kendra the Lahmeyer family. | ] ] ] Email Marketing by [ [DirectIQ ] ](=)

Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, friends! Thank you for all your support in my run for congress thus far! Meeting with the North Country voters from Lake George to Plattsburgh, Gouverneur to Glens Falls has been both informative and motivating. I’ve heard the personal stories of challenges with covid in the workplace, school, and home. I’ve heard the need for a representative that is one of us, who gets what it means to live here, work here and call the North Country home. I cannot wait to meet with more of you in the New Year. I’m excited for 2022, when we can return the 21st Congressional seat to those for whom it was drawn - the people of the North Country, us. Now is our time. Happy Holidays, Bridie Farrell | Bridie Farrell is a crime victims advocate and former U.S. National Speed Skater running against far-right Rep. Elise Stefanik in her home district of NY-21. body:

| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
_**Merry Christmas!**_ Each Saturday this year I have sent you an update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy highlighting our work.

This Saturday, being Christmas - the most special day of the year - I thought I would share with you some of the most fun moments the team had at the MCPP this year.
---
|
---
**_Unveiling the new sign!_**
|
---
**_Our team volunteering at the Salvation Army Christmas appeal!_**
|
---
**_Christmas drinks!_**
|
---
_**Hunter Estes, our Senior Director of Policy & Communications, began Officer Candidate School in the Mississippi Army National Guard!**_
|
---
_**Tech Policy Analyst Matthew Nicaud made a trip up to HQ!**_
|
---
_**Meeting Mike Pence... and Nikki Haley!**_
| |
---

Warm Regards this Christmas,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---

name: Mike Durant
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
body:
DURANT FOR SENATE

<>

Hey friends,

I’d like to wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas this year.

This year has undoubtedly taken a toll on all of us, but we can always find
peace in knowing that the true meaning of Christmas is celebrating the birth of
our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ, and knowing his love for us. Whenever I am
down about the state of our nation, I know that my Christian faith has saved me.

Despite all the chaos, I have hope for Alabama and for America. I know that
we’re a nation of fighters and in the end, freedom will always prevail.

I’d like to thank you for your support from the bottom of my heart. Together,
we can fight to bring America back to all her glory.

God Bless you, your family, and the United States of America.

Merry Christmas,

Mike Durant

PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
Not authorized by any other candidate.
DURANT FOR SENATE
PO Box 11548
Huntsville, AL 35814

Mike Durant is retired from the U.S. Army, where he served for 22 years.
Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Departments of Army or Defense.

name: The Schmidt Family
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Merry Christmas from the Schmidt family. We are hoping you have a wonderful holiday season full of laughter and loved ones, and enjoyable food and fe Friend, Merry Christmas from the Schmidt family. We are hoping you have a wonderful holiday season full of laughter and loved ones, and enjoyable food and festivities. It has been a busy year for us and, thanks to you, a successful one. Derek’s campaign for governor is going strong. We have 11 months to go, but I know he is enjoying traveling Kansas as he always has, seeing old friends and making new ones, while continuing his work as Attorney General. We are blessed with a 105-county strong campaign team, generous donors, tremendous volunteers, and a very tired coffeemaker that helps him keep up the 18-hour days. The kids have been busy, as well. Our older daughter, Caroline, is a high school senior. She is a dedicated flutist, NHS member, and Humane Society volunteer. She made the decision to attend KU next year and is leaning towards studying special education. The highlight of her year, though, was getting Twyla, her very own kitten. Claire, our younger daughter, is a high school junior. She stays busy playing on the basketball team, completing her NHS volunteer hours, and modeling. This year she walked in fashion shows in Kansas City and Wichita, and appeared in magazines as well. The highlight of her year, though, was getting her very own pup, Olivia. As for me, I stay busy teaching amazing and hard-working law students, taking care of our kids (and their animals), and attending as many campaign events as I can. This Christmas season we thank God for you, for this great state, and for this free country. May God bless you and yours now and in the new year. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year, Jennifer (and Derek) Schmidt | |
---
