clean_body: Merry Christmas from the Schmidt family. We are hoping you have a wonderful holiday season full of laughter and loved ones, and enjoyable food and fe Friend, Merry Christmas from the Schmidt family. We are hoping you have a wonderful holiday season full of laughter and loved ones, and enjoyable food and festivities. It has been a busy year for us and, thanks to you, a successful one. Derek’s campaign for governor is going strong. We have 11 months to go, but I know he is enjoying traveling Kansas as he always has, seeing old friends and making new ones, while continuing his work as Attorney General. We are blessed with a 105-county strong campaign team, generous donors, tremendous volunteers, and a very tired coffeemaker that helps him keep up the 18-hour days. The kids have been busy, as well. Our older daughter, Caroline, is a high school senior. She is a dedicated flutist, NHS member, and Humane Society volunteer. She made the decision to attend KU next year and is leaning towards studying special education. The highlight of her year, though, was getting Twyla, her very own kitten. Claire, our younger daughter, is a high school junior. She stays busy playing on the basketball team, completing her NHS volunteer hours, and modeling. This year she walked in fashion shows in Kansas City and Wichita, and appeared in magazines as well. The highlight of her year, though, was getting her very own pup, Olivia. As for me, I stay busy teaching amazing and hard-working law students, taking care of our kids (and their animals), and attending as many campaign events as I can. This Christmas season we thank God for you, for this great state, and for this free country. May God bless you and yours now and in the new year. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year, Jennifer (and Derek) Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Good morning, everyone! I hope that your holiday has gotten off to a wonderful start. I couldn’t be more grateful to spend this joyful day safely with family and friends. Today, take some time to reflect on just how far we’ve come – together – as a state since this time last year. Looking forward, I hope we can all carry the spirit of this season into the new year – and continue to be grateful, kind, compassionate, and give back. Today and every day, I’m thankful to serve as the Governor of our beautiful state. From Ashley, Carley, Kathy and me – Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays. – Steve

body:
We hope you’re having a wonderful winter holiday.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40010492/322449876/-1115558287?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmY3YTAwZC04YzY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JggAwqGEskOB1aGQ1-mfnlQEraKcNsrg6OE1S4XUzk=&emci=bf95d45b-2064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a6f7a00d-8c65-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14488557)

Hi Friends, Happy holidays to all of you, and Merry Christmas to those who celebrate today! I’m lucky enough to be celebrating with my family, and I hope you are as well. This year has been full of challenges, but also opportunities. I have had the chance to meet so many of the people who make Ohio unlike any other place in this country. You all have been a constant reminder of my passion for public service. The holidays can be difficult even when it doesn’t feel like the world is up in flames. Remember to be kind to yourself, and have hope for our future. I certainly do. I am sending the best energy I can to you and your loved ones, and I cannot wait to get started again in the New Year. Happy Holidays, Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sara=20Walsh?=
subject: The Weary World Rejoices: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Walsh for Congress
body:
This Christmas, I pray your home and your heart will be filled with the Peace, Comfort, Hope and Love of Jesus Christ, the Savior of the World. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4853f12930bd/the-weary-world-rejoices-merry-christmas?e=4df934edcc)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

Christmas has always been my favorite time of year. I especially love all the traditional songs that so deeply express the heart of the holiday. The lyrics are rich and true and powerful.

_"Joy to the world! The Lord is come, Let earth receive her King! Let every heart prepare Him room, And heaven and nature sing." _

_"O holy night the stars are brightly shining, It is the night of our dear Savior's birth, Long lay the world in sin and error pining, 'Til He appeared and the soul felt its worth, A thrill of hope the weary world rejoices, For yonder breaks, A new and glorious morn, Fall on your knees, O hear the angel voices, O night divine, O night when Christ was born." _

_"Silent night, holy night! All is calm, and all is bright, Round yon Virgin, Mother and Child, Holy infant so tender and mild, Sleep in heavenly peace, Sleep in heavenly peace." _

For many of us, however, the last two years have been marked by sickness and death, by pain and suffering. How do we find joy amidst the sadness? Heavenly peace amidst the pain? Calm amidst the chaos?

For me, it is through faith in Jesus Christ, my Lord and Savior, and by running to Him in every situation through prayer, reading the Word, and fellowship with other believers.

In Isaiah 9:6 we read the prophecy that foretold of Jesus: "For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given: and the government shall be upon his shoulder: and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, The mighty God, The everlasting Father, The Prince of Peace."

He is our Counsellor in all our heartbreaking situations. Our everlasting Father in this world of broken relationships. Our Prince of Peace amidst life's storms.

This Christmas, I pray your home and your heart will be filled with the Peace, Comfort, Hope and Love of Jesus Christ, the Savior of the World.

Merry Christmas and God Bless!
Sara Walsh
---

| Friends,

As we celebrate the holiday season, I want to thank you all for your support, but more importantly wish you and yours the very best for the coming year. We live in the greatest nation in the world, and have much to be thankful for. Together, we'll work to keep it that way.

We are wishing you and your family a very Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!

\-- Larry & Deb Casha

clean_body: | | | | | | Friends, As we celebrate the holiday season, I want to thank you all for your support, but more importantly wish you and yours the very best for the coming year. We live in the greatest nation in the world, and have much to be thankful for. Together, we'll work to keep it that way. We are wishing you and your family a very Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! \-- Larry & Deb Casha | | | | | | | Paid for by: Casha For Congress, Inc.115 Horseneck RdSuite 6Montville, NJ 07045-9365

name: Bridget Barton
subject: Merry Christmas! 🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridget Barton for Oregon
body:
| | | I’m sure you're busy this morning Peter, so I’ll keep this quick...

I just wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a Merry Christmas! 🎄
---
---
This is such a special time of the year, when we slow down and reflect on our countless blessings.

This year has been tough for many of us. Even though we’ve been stifled, we haven’t been crushed. At this time of year the days are short and dark but the Christmas season renews our hope and brightens our hearts. Our independent spirit is still strong and I know better days are ahead. I’m relentlessly optimistic about Oregon’s future. Stay strong and celebrate!

From my family to yours, Merry Christmas and all the best in the New Year.

\- Bridget
---

name: Paul Farrow - Chairman
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
Thank you for all you have done this year.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_christmas_letter_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- Merry Christmas from all of us at the Republican Party of Wisconsin! We hope you are having a relaxing and safe holiday season surrounded by loved ones. I just wanted to reach out personally to share my appreciation for all you do. Our grassroots supporters put in so much work this year to help lay the groundwork ahead of Wisconsin’s crucial elections in 2022. Thanks to the help of grassroots supporters like you, we were able to launch the Election Reform Task Force, which suggested numerous election integrity bills to the Wisconsin State Legislature. We launched the largest local elections effort in Republican state history – supporting conservative candidates running for local office in every corner of the state. And of course, we hired more staff, opened more campaign headquarters, and started to craft our strategy to take back the governor’s office, hold our seat in the U.S. Senate, and win at all levels of the ballot next year. Whether you knocked on doors, made phone calls, ran for office, signed up to be a poll worker, or simply shared the conservative message in your community, we appreciate you. Once again, I wish you and your family all of the best this Christmas as 2021 comes to a close. Thanks to you, we are ready to hit the ground running on January 1 to make sure we win in November. I hope you’ll join us. Forward, Paul Farrow
Chairman
Republican Party of Wisconsin
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_christmas_letter_v3&n=2).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_christmas_letter_v3&n=3) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_christmas_letter_v3&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_christmas_letter_v3&n=5), software for leaders.

name: Rob Portman
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate
body:
Merry Christmas from our family to yours! We hope you and your loved ones have
a wonderful holiday season and a blessed New Year.

Peter,

Merry Christmas from our family to yours! We hope you and your loved ones
have a wonderful holiday season and a blessed New Year.

During this Christmas season we give special thanks for the men and women
serving in our Armed Forces who are unable to be with their loved ones over the
holidays.

As 2021 draws to a close, I want to thank you for your continued friendship
and support. It has been an honor to serve you in the U.S. Senate, and while I
am not running for re-election next year, I will continue to do all I can in
the next year to get things done that help the people of Ohio and move our
great country forward.

Merry Christmas, and I hope to see you soon in the new year.

All best,
Rob

Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=5167ed8367&u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=44f4e21f72)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
# Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!
_And the angel said to them, “Fear not, for behold, I bring you good news of great joy that will be for all the people. For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.”_ _\- Luke 2:10,11_|
---
This year, we are celebrating Christmas and cherishing the opportunity to gather as a family during the holiday season. I hope you and your family have a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! This is a moment for celebration, connecting with loved ones, and reflecting on the past year.We have been blessed by God so much this past year and as I look back, I thank Him for providing for my family faithfully through every step. I am also proud that America has remained committed to its principles, allowing all to freely celebrate their faith, heritage, and traditions.So as we are looking forward to 2022, I want to pause and extend my warmest to you and your family. I pray that this season treats you well.Merry Christmas,Shawn Hyland
|
---

I hope you and your family have a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! This is a moment for celebration, connecting with loved ones, and reflecting on the past year.We have been blessed by God so much this past year and as I look back, I thank Him for providing for my family faithfully through every step. I am also proud that America has remained committed to its principles, allowing all to freely celebrate their faith, heritage, and traditions.So as we are looking forward to 2022, I want to pause and extend my warmest to you and your family. I pray that this season treats you well.Merry Christmas,Shawn Hyland | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2021 Hyland for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: American Defense News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z01fpef4v7rnncmo11grbeerek98rhcsi59jjp18_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrbeob1etib5d3ieqr32opgc9jb0srmepj6dchlcqp70thhe9qm6ddim5pr1o776v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j3applmdjr5cb6e5ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5g62ob3c9ieeoh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc0rh4idvsif570c3kkt2k237p8rjiv068ou3n3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5gm6oj4sth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zamira8tg1r0is8d0qf45vcvvdld6jeoiogc50to_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5gm6oj4sth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zddbofe8gmhdg6vrobvu29oqenq1nt75m7e1o83o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c5gm6oj4sth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Christmas Update
body: Merry Christmas! [INSIDE JW] MERRY CHRISTMAS! [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=26527&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1IMW5SYzNrc01WbyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Our nation is unsettled in this Christmas season. Incomprehensible things are occurring in Washington under a Biden administration seemingly bent on undermining our constitution and the values by which we have traditionally lived. But, nevertheless, at this time of year, the nation perseveres to celebrate a miraculous event 2,000 years ago. Recall that the Spanish Flu epidemic created turmoil [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=26528&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc21pdGhzb25pYW5tYWcuY29tL2hpc3Rvcnkvd2hhdC1wYW5kZW1pYy1jaHJpc3RtYXMtMTkxOC1sb29rZWQtMTgwOTc2NTQxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] at Christmas 1918. People suffered through mask mandates and lockdowns. Merchants, eager to cash in on holiday gift buying, fretted that their supply chains wouldn’t hold up. Perhaps the best symbol of that year was the Ohio state health commissioner warning: “Beware the mistletoe.” Sound familiar? Still, the people endured. They celebrated Christmas. So let us ignore the mean-spirited rhetoric [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=26529&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0aW9uYWxyZXZpZXcuY29tL2Nvcm5lci93aGl0ZS1ob3VzZS1tZXNzYWdlLW9uLWNvdmlkLWlzLWRlaHVtYW5pemluZy1hbmQtdW5wZXJzdWFzaXZlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] blowing from the White House today and, again, look back a century ago. In his 1922 Christmas message [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=26530&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jb29saWRnZWZvdW5kYXRpb24ub3JnL3Jlc291cmNlcy8xOTIyLWNocmlzdG1hcy1ldmUtbWVzc2FnZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] to the country, President Calvin Coolidge promoted hope for our country on this holy day. When the first Christmas came to mankind it ... established the foundation of the civilization of the Western world. Through all the shifting changes of more than nineteen centuries this revelation has remained, constant, unshaken, secure.... Persevere and go forward, obedient to the divine instruction: ‘Be ye constant in well doing.’ That way lies our promised peace and good will of which the angels sang with joy as they beheld the miracle of the first Christmas. The mission of America is to make that vision a reality. “Fear not!” The Bible repeats this 365 times [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=26531&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmlibGVzdHVkeXRvb2xzLmNvbS9iaWJsZS1zdHVkeS90b3BpY2FsLXN0dWRpZXMvd2hhdC1kb2VzLXRoZS1iaWJsZS1zYXktYWJvdXQtZmVhci5odG1sP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]. It is a good admonishment for us as we move into a new year. Merry Christmas to you and yours from all of us here at Judicial Watch, and a happy New Year! Until Next Week... [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57470&L=885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL21lbWJlcnMuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] | Unsubscribe [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/unsubscribe.php?M=27089954&C=eea98a79fb2fad93cccd0bd228df4000&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=38&N=57470&AGENCY=jw] View in browser [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?&L=1&M=27089954&N=57470&AGENCY=jw&drurl=ZGlzcGxheS5waHA/TT0yNzA4OTk1NCZDPWVlYTk4YTc5ZmIyZmFkOTNjY2NkMGJkMjI4ZGY0MDAwJkU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tJkw9MzgmTj0xNDI2MSZTPTU3NDcwJkFHRU5DWT1qdyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I hate to be the one to tell you this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
My team just informed me [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6603%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bqs56PveTL5Ye5P6lnmG7A&sysid=1)
My team just informed me

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68180%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HrxARjQ5c%2bBwFEGFw4dSMg&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team just told me.

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer’s going to be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. Now I can take a punch, but I don’t want to take one if I can avoid it. **[So, if you’re able and willing to help me out, it’d mean the world to me if you’d rush what you can to support my re-election campaign for 2022.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68181%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QUKhPfXYNp%2fFktI%2f8zSSwg&sysid=1)** | [RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68182%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B%2bZUVXJYxdll%2fmTQEnZPbw&sysid=1)
---

**[If you can rush $5, $10, or even $100 so I can fight back, I promise you I won’t forget it.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68183%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MCDfCXkfmvs2HunL%2b4wZ0g&sysid=1)**

Your support is the only thing that keeps me in this fight to stop the Socialist Agenda.

Together, we’re going to be able to stop their attacks on our freedom and our Democracy. [RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68184%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zJdHudWidB4iUOvJeINofw&sysid=1)
---

Thank you for helping me make up ground and fight back against Chuck and the Radical Left.

God Bless,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68180%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HrxARjQ5c%2bBwFEGFw4dSMg&sysid=1)
Senator John Kennedy

clean_body: My team just informed me My team just informed me | Folks, I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team just told me. We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer’s going to be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. Now I can take a punch, but I don’t want to take one if I can avoid it. | Your support is the only thing that keeps me in this fight to stop the Socialist Agenda. Together, we’re going to be able to stop their attacks on our freedom and our Democracy. Thank you for helping me make up ground and fight back against Chuck and the Radical Left. God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
I hope you have a wonderful and joyful day.

|
---
Friend,

Merry Christmas! I hope you and your family have a wonderful and blessed day. Christmas is a time to thank God for all of His blessings. Today I am spending the day with my family and cherishing every moment.

I hope you have a wonderful and joyful day.

God Bless,

Senator Mike Braun | Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | | |
---
| **Merry Christmas!**
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! Merry Christmas! May God’s blessings, peace, joy, strength, encouragement, and love be upon you and your whole family! ** **As we celebrate this Christmas Day, I absolutely believe this one thing has always been true - God is a good God that loves to surprise us with good news, even in a time or way we never expected. Roughly 2,000 years ago, the powerful Roman Empire was ruling the people of God, and they were praying for deliverance. God heard their prayers and came in a surprise fashion with humility to be born in manger amongst animals. Jesus the King was not afraid to get humble and truly live among us, and like us. He gave us the greatest gift we could have of all - Himself. Through Him, we can have eternal life, forgiveness of sin, access to his unlimited joy, and life abundantly. ** **Lisa and I pray that you enjoy this Christmas, spend some great time with your family, and enjoy getting to know the humble and surprising King Jesus in a new way today.

God bless you, and God bless America

-Jerry, Lisa, Michael, & Levi Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=66b91ff5c6&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=c8630287aa&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

subject: Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b191e3439ea3/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-5337478?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=be282dbe2c&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| Dear friends,

In the season that honors the birth of a babe, we celebrate the arrival of two new children into our family – Cole Matthew Edwards and Ruth Abigail Jensen! Their births are a welcome reminder of the power of potential and the gift of growth. As we look to the coming year, let us all embrace the potential within to grow into a more loving, inclusive, and joyful people.
---
| I wish you and yours a very happy holiday!
---
|
---
|
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Troy=20Carter?=
subject: A Look Back At What We Accomplished In 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Troy Carter for Congress
body:
I hope that you and your family stay safe and enjoy this holiday season. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/troycarter4congress/2021-wrapped?e=dd5c2df611)
---
| | [ ](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=79f3a35ece&e=dd5c2df611)
---
| | [A Look Back At What We Accomplished In 2021](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=5bf9448301&e=dd5c2df611 "A Look Back At What We Accomplished In 2021")
---
| Dear Friend,

As 2021 comes to a close, I thought it would be fitting to review some of the biggest accomplishments we have made in less than a year since my election to represent you in the U.S. House of Representatives.

The COVID-19 pandemic is still present in everything we do, and despite not yet being elected when the [American Rescue Plan Act of 2021](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=bcb3b7a717&e=dd5c2df611) passed, I have been proud to ensure that the funding from it reaches the places in our communities that need it most.

Along with the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021 came the largest [Child Tax Credit ](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=23a48716ea&e=dd5c2df611)ever and historic relief to the most working families ever. The Child Tax Credit has and will continue to reduce child poverty in our communities.
---
| [ ](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=06ea039894&e=dd5c2df611)
---
[ ](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=99013e3f21&e=dd5c2df611)
---
| This year, President Joe Biden signed the [Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act,](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=066f91ae0c&e=dd5c2df611) and I was proud to be able to celebrate alongside leaders from across the country for playing a pivotal role in passing the bill.

The bipartisan investment in our infrastructure will bring billions of dollars to the state of Louisiana to improve our roads, bridges, clean drinking water, broadband access, ports, coast, environmental quality, and so much more.

I have also been proud to lead other efforts in Washington D.C. Bringing federal investments to [New Orleans East](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=749890ac39&e=dd5c2df611) has been a priority of mine, and I am proud to support the revitalization and investment in Lincoln Beach to spark economic growth in New Orleans East.

We have accomplished and fought for so much in such a short, challenging year. However, moving forward we have even more to fight for like protecting the right to vote, fighting climate change, securing a living wage, and investing in our middle class.
---
|
---
---
| I hope that you and your family stay safe and enjoy this holiday season.

[__**Please consider chipping in $30 today**__](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=e8ce11ba78&e=dd5c2df611) to help me continue making progress for the people of Louisiana.

Sincerely,
Congressman Troy Carter
---
| [CHIP IN $30](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=8ddca9f98d&e=dd5c2df611 "CHIP IN $30")
---
| |
---
| Paid for By Troy Carter for Congress
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 , All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Troy Carter For CongressPO Box 50730New Orleans, LA 70150
[Add us to your address book](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f&e=dd5c2df611&c=a9d8ecd41d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://troycarter4congress.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f&e=dd5c2df611&c=a9d8ecd41d).
---

name: Joe Arpaio
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor
body:
It's that time of year, and I hope you have a Merry Christmas. |
No longer want to receive emails from Joe? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_s=71e981b413c24290b7271e555183b815&_t=haEPPwqE4wzzIOGTXwHf2aO3l6wjBkn1VqmpDhr4DwO2Ce6NNHqAIAIquKAm-ua7AAs7bVxM8Ng63lg6d0fM2tEoqrbjyVGdXUHuOGS3vepwzHkrtM9A5shl-hoX4djRObZcGgMI8p3jjyG6VbJ8RjOyAqNhwwLLPs6X6dw6QxI%3D).
[](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=71e981b413c24290b7271e555183b815&_e=3sagPKT9m_rokYG7uVDb9N-gY6faygXETmochJhtb1g8KH3PW_Z8faughYScxNwrCt17JtyEphLeCXKgFrIhs62P82r-5Az6pZTJgxeaY-QinTrPQeutdYSaYlzu12SlWtb6yC5TGC1BUJVfYDQecnp43-l29-Aq96N7qvhAaQd2epRDRfIStBS6XxgRJKv4XLyvakKvqfIP9ZoIVl69yC_N6CUhWFGPlcggAEFbTNJSliTq6G4FNUDpLSk4rAOLOSWa8NIk9ju4_10rDcx8oJuJrwhGYwNBaGaEsiPqLsSeHD_Wfj3-T0AaelQikI0aD3OoL7JIxMelPvkLC8dxJbdu6-EeS5GUsXK3hc3Lx6zVdfanwtprFaiV9TNGNASUMdUc8KTTxwll6a7N0IJzjp3Vnk694qcxFcYRJq7cAAY%3D)

---
Merry Christmas Fellow Conservative,

It’s that time of year and I think we should all give thanks for everyone that’s still in our lives and has stood by our sides through everything these past couple of years.

I know for me I’m very grateful for everything you’ve done Fellow Conservative, to stand by me or support me at every turn, and I can’t thank you enough.

I hope you were able to spend some real quality time with family and friends for Christmas while enjoying every moment with them, because it’s those little moments that end up meaning the most.

Again thank you for everything, and Merry Christmas to you and your family.

**Joe Arpaio**

* * *
_Joe Arpaio is running for Mayor of Fountain Hills to restore order and real leadership in a time of need. Fighting for public safety, stopping mismanagement, and providing the leadership the community needs are his top priorities. If you believe in Joe Arpaio,[**please pitch in and donate to his campaign today.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=71e981b413c24290b7271e555183b815&_e=3sagPKT9m_rokYG7uVDb9N-gY6faygXETmochJhtb1g8KH3PW_Z8faughYScxNwrCt17JtyEphLeCXKgFrIhs62P82r-5Az6pZTJgxeaY-QinTrPQeutdYSaYlzu12SlWtb6yC5TGC1BUJVfYDQecnp43-l29-Aq96N7qvhAaQd2epRDRfIStBS6XxgRJKv4XLyvakKvqfIP9ZoIVl69yAbXUL6qohMWM7zvCXn7efGUadVYcrrM_a-sY2_YIn4Wlys0gCWIG4aMsVojJ2Ee8se8_uweQ-ihS8fnrGmLyBmJUIRTe26WUFfyHUIrPj01EvHZ-75LrLGu-1pFm_6i5971RTI-ncFNyngA-x1zvt6jbv_xm2Zxv-jGBBlHiOyvY_qixuwihXAKVcUdUYWr_UNVyuPXECEgxdeW284SzAw%3D)_

clean_body: It's that time of year, and I hope you have a Merry Christmas. | No longer want to receive emails from Joe? You may . Merry Christmas Fellow Conservative, It’s that time of year and I think we should all give thanks for everyone that’s still in our lives and has stood by our sides through everything these past couple of years. I know for me I’m very grateful for everything you’ve done Fellow Conservative, to stand by me or support me at every turn, and I can’t thank you enough. I hope you were able to spend some real quality time with family and friends for Christmas while enjoying every moment with them, because it’s those little moments that end up meaning the most. Again thank you for everything, and Merry Christmas to you and your family. Joe Arpaio Joe Arpaio is running for Mayor of Fountain Hills to restore order and real leadership in a time of need. Fighting for public safety, stopping mismanagement, and providing the leadership the community needs are his top priorities. If you believe in Joe Arpaio, Experience. Principles. Leadership.** | | Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor. Authorized by Joe Arpaio.
